description: Add a fresh twist to your accessories this summer by wearing a classic adidas timepiece with updated design details. Sporty at heart but stylish on your wrist, this watch makes for a great buy! Case diameter: 45 mm Case thickness: 10 mm Dial shape: Oval Warranty: 2 Years Black plastic case with a fixed bezel Black grooved, rubber strap with a tang clasp Digital time display Alarm, stop clock, light display features Lap memory that allows the watch to record your laps Steel case back 5 ATM water resistance tested using the equivalent static depth rating, with resistance at 50 meters
